notes.subject: Best Burger America 2026!
notes.body: Let's grow - Best Burger 2026! This is HUGE - Congratulations! Keep up the Standards & Consistency and we'll keep the trend running! BOGO starts tomorrow - exciting times to be with this Brand! Pre-shift the crew on standards under volume — speed cannot break consistency.

notes.subject: Permit #120072 — Inspection 5/12 REGULAR
notes.body: Regular health inspection completed 5/12. Report attached to fg2065 inbox. Pull the PDF, photograph any findings, file in the Steritech binder.

notes.body: Background check sent for Anthony Pirtle. Anthony added to employee directory today as Anthony — (PHONE PENDING). Active count: 23 → 24. Pull phone from BG-check PDF when it lands.

notes.subject: L-Rev overdue for 5/11 AND 5/12
notes.body: Two Labor Reviews now outstanding at KY-2065-Dixie (5/11 + 5/12). Yesterday's brief flagged the 5/11 task; 5/12 added overnight. Close both in NetChef before Crystal sees the alert chain.
